channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Keir Starmer's party lost big in U.K. local elections. Here's what comes next.
item.description: U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.
item.content:encoded:
U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's Labour party suffered major losses in local elections held across Britain last week. So far, Starmer has rejected calls for his resignation.

(Image credit: Hannah McKay/AP)
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster

item.title: Temple Israel rebuilds after terror attack
item.description: Two months ago, a gunman drove through the preschool at Temple Israel, the largest synagogue in Michigan. Every child and teacher survived, but the community is still displaced and navigating the trauma of the attack.
item.content:encoded: Two months ago, a gunman drove through the preschool at Temple Israel, the largest synagogue in Michigan. Every child and teacher survived, but the community is still displaced and navigating the trauma of the attack.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Sprunt

item.title: Happy Mother's Day to the kindest mom. P.S. Your kindness annoyed me when I was a kid
item.description: She and her siblings had to make tea for and share food with every visitor. That did not make her happy. Today she has a different perspective. So she finally asked her mom: What made you so kind?
item.content:encoded:
She and her siblings had to make tea for and share food with every visitor. That did not make her happy. Today she has a different perspective. So she finally asked her mom: What made you so kind?

(Image credit: Family photo)
item.dc:creator: Esther Ndumi Ngumbi

item.title: Of course we look for ourselves in art — but if we stop there, we're missing out
item.description: As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what we look for in art.
item.content:encoded:
Lord of the Flies adaptation.'/>

As I watched the new series, I only cared about Piggy — the thoughtful, smart kid stranded on an island with other boys. That made me think about what we look for in art.

(Image credit: J Redza)
item.dc:creator: Glen Weldon

item.title: How a pill approved 25 years ago transformed cancer treatment
item.description: When the Food and Drug Administration approved Gleevec to treat a form of leukemia in 2001, it ushered in a new era in cancer care.
item.content:encoded:
When the Food and Drug Administration approved Gleevec to treat a form of leukemia in 2001, it ushered in a new era in cancer care.

(Image credit: Kristyna Wentz-Graff)
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: Cape Verde: Tiny nation, massive World Cup dream
item.description: In Cape Verde, a small island nation off West Africa, World Cup qualification is transforming dreams on and off the pitch.
item.content:encoded:
In Cape Verde, a small island nation off West Africa, World Cup qualification is transforming dreams on and off the pitch.

(Image credit: Ricci Shryock for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Ricci Shryock

item.title: Iran ceasefire tested as cargo ship catches fire after being hit off Qatar's coast
item.description: A cargo ship caught fire Sunday after being hit by an unknown projectile off Qatar's coast, the British military said.
item.content:encoded: A cargo ship caught fire Sunday after being hit by an unknown projectile off Qatar's coast, the British military said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Gas, groceries and getting by: How voters in one Ohio district see affordability
item.description: Ohio voters headed to the polls last week for primary elections, and in competitive districts like the one where Toledo is primarily located, the message was clear: affordability is a top priority.
item.content:encoded: Ohio voters headed to the polls last week for primary elections, and in competitive districts like the one where Toledo is primarily located, the message was clear: affordability is a top priority.
item.dc:creator: Catie Dull

item.title: Protests and boycotts rock prestigious Venice Biennale
item.description: The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.
item.content:encoded:
The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.

(Image credit: Luca Bruno)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: 'We're dry:' The new U.S. Wildland Fire Service prepares for extreme fire season
item.description: Brian Fennessy, new head of the U.S. Wildland Fire Service, says his agency is 'trying to bring on additional aircraft and bring them on early,' and dismisses criticism of prevention methods.
item.content:encoded:
Brian Fennessy, new head of the U.S. Wildland Fire Service, says his agency is 'trying to bring on additional aircraft and bring them on early,' and dismisses criticism of prevention methods.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson
